name: cal-heatmap

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written SVG when you need to compress daily habits, activity, or commit counts into a GitHub contribution-style calendar grid, because native implementations fail on date bucketing, week/month boundaries, color scales, and navigation across domains.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only assemble static squares, not bucket dates consistently by time zone, handle missing dates, align weeks across months, apply continuous color scales, or navigate dates; cal-heatmap closes these error-prone steps directly from date/value records.

data_in.note: points becomes paint().data.source directly; upstream converts date strings to timestamps, and value is aggregated within the same subdomain. boot fixes x='date' and y='value' so AI does not have to assemble field mappings again.

schema.start?: ISO-8601 date/time string | epoch-milliseconds -- default current time
schema.range?: positive integer -- boot defaults to 12 domains

domain?.label?: native Cal-Heatmap domain.label object -- by default generated for the domain type and placed at bottom

subDomain?.type?: native subdomain name compatible with the selected domain -- boot default 'day'
subDomain?.label?: dayjs format string | null -- default null

scale?._default: upstream default color quantize, domain [0,100], scheme 'YlOrBr'

color?.range?: CSS color string[] -- generated from scheme by default

scale?.opacity?: native Cal-Heatmap opacity scale object -- unset by default

spec.note: The calendar SVG grid needs stable pixel geometry; boot defaults the container height to 190px, while actual width is determined by range and cell size. Pass only an explicit px height; do not use vh or percentage heights (iron rule 3).

when_to_use: 需要把每日习惯、活跃度或提交量压成 GitHub contribution 风格的日历格网时用它而非手写 SVG,因为原生在日期分桶、周/月边界、色阶和跨域导航上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能拼静态方格,做不到按时区稳定归桶、处理缺失日期、跨月周对齐、连续色阶与日期导航;cal-heatmap 用 date/value 记录直接闭环这些高错率步骤。

data_in.note: points 直接成为 paint().data.source;date 字符串由上游转为时间戳,value 按同一子域聚合。boot 固定 x='date'、y='value',避免让 AI 再拼字段映射。

schema.start?: ISO-8601 date/time string | epoch-milliseconds —— 默认当前时间
schema.range?: positive integer —— boot 默认 12 个 domain

domain?.label?: Cal-Heatmap 原生 domain.label 对象 —— 默认按 domain 类型生成并放在 bottom

subDomain?.type?: 与所选 domain 兼容的原生子域名 —— boot 默认 'day'
subDomain?.label?: dayjs format string | null —— 默认 null

color?.scheme?: d3 chromatic scheme name —— 默认 'YlOrBr'
color?.range?: CSS color string[] —— 默认由 scheme 生成
color?.type?: d3 scale type string —— 默认 'quantize'

scale?.opacity?: Cal-Heatmap 原生 opacity scale 对象 —— 默认不设置

spec.note: 日历 SVG 的格网几何需要稳定像素空间;boot 默认容器高度 190px,实际宽度由 range 与 cell 尺寸决定。只传明确 px 高度,禁用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

example._why: domain/subDomain 配对、日期字段映射和色阶嵌套高歧义,minimal example 明确每日记录进入月域格网的原生路径。

carriers.widget: conditional:须把 cal-heatmap.css 与 Element 挂载点一并放入 shadowRoot;本 boot 不启用可能创建额外浮层的 Tooltip 插件
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + shadow-neutral SVG + 同源 CSS,无 worker/wasm 或默认上行依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm 默认导出 zd as default → import CalHeatmap 正确;paint({itemSelector,range,date:{start},domain,subDomain,data:{source,x,y,groupY},scale,theme,verticalOrientation}) 顶层 key 在 +esm 均命中(itemSelector×2/groupY×2/source×8/subDomain×16/domain×126/verticalOrientation×7);data_in points[{date,value}]→data.source + 固定 x='date'/y='value' 正确;CSS cal-heatmap.css 存在。隔离:+esm 0 document.body append、0 window/document 全局监听、无 head 注入(bundle 内 1 处 createElement('style') 未随 document.head/body append,呈 D3 SVG 作用域内);本 boot 不启用会向 body 放浮层的 Tooltip 插件。shadowCompatible=yes:SVG+外链 CSS 均落 shadow、无 body/head 突变,boot 已把 CSS+挂载点放 shadow。
